title: Frame for supporting a light guide panel and luminaire comprising the frame
abstract: The present invention relates to a frame (100) for supporting a light guide panel (120). The frame (100) being provided with: a solid state light source (102) connected to and arranged on a circuit board (104), the circuit board (104) comprising an electrically insulating outer perimeter portion (104a); an insulation layer (106) being electrically insulating, the insulation layer (106) having a surface area larger than a surface area of the circuit board (104); wherein the insulation layer (106) is arranged on the frame (100); the circuit board (104) is arranged on the insulation layer (106) such that an insulating outer perimeter portion (106a) of the insulation layer (106) is formed outside of the circuit board (106); thereby providing a double insulation of the solid state light source (102) in relation to the frame (100). The invention also relates to a luminaire (130) comprising the frame (100).
claims:
Claims CLAIMS: 1. A frame (100) for supporting a light guide panel (120), the frame (100) comprising: a solid state light source (102) connected to and arranged on a circuit board (104), the circuit board (104) comprising an electrically insulating outer perimeter portion (104a); and an insulation layer (106) being electrically insulating, the insulation layer (106) having a surface area larger than a surface area of the circuit board (104); wherein the insulation layer (106) is arranged on the frame (100); wherein the circuit board (104) is arranged on the insulation layer (106) such that an insulating outer perimeter portion (106a) of the insulation layer (106) is formed outside of the circuit board (106); thereby providing a double insulation of the solid state light source (102) in relation to the frame (100). 2. The frame (100) according to claim 1, wherein the circuit board (104) comprises a material having a proof tracking index, PTI, greater than 600, and wherein the electrically insulating outer perimeter portion (104a) of the circuit board (104) is having a smallest width (w c i, w c2 ) of 3.0 mm, preferably 1.5 mm. 3. The frame (100) according to claim 2, wherein the electrically insulating outer perimeter portion (104a) of the circuit board (104) consist of a material having a PTI greater than 600. 4. The frame (100) according to any one of claims 1-3, wherein the insulation layer (106) consists of a material having a PTI greater than 600, wherein the insulating outer perimeter portion (106a) of the insulation layer (106) is having a smallest width (wi) of 3.0 mm, preferably 1.5 mm. 5. The frame (100) according to any one of claims 1-4, wherein the insulation layer (106) is planar. 6. The frame (100) according to any one of claims 1-4, wherein the insulation layer (106) is bent. 7. The frame (100) according to claim 6, wherein the insulation layer (106) is bent around at least one end portion of the circuit board (106). 8. The frame (100) according to claim 7, wherein the portion of the insulation layer (106) bent around the at least one end portion of the circuit board (104) is fixed to the circuit board (104). 9. The frame (100) according to any one of claims 1-8, wherein the insulation layer (106) comprises a plurality of parts (106) overlapping each other. 10. The frame (100) according to any one of claims 1-9, further comprising a non- insulated driver (124) for driving the solid state light source (102). 11. The frame (100) according to claim 10, wherein the non-insulated driver (124) is configured to be powered by alternating voltage having a RMS working voltage below or equal to 500V, preferably 250V. 12. A luminaire (130) comprising: the frame (100) according to any one of claims 1-11; and a light guide panel (120) supported by the frame (100), wherein the solid state light source (102) is configured to couple light into a side surface of the light guide panel (120). 13. The luminaire (130) according to claim 12, further comprising a rim (122) configured to fixate the light guide panel (120) to the frame (100). The luminaire (130) according to claim 13, wherein the rim (122) is provided insulation layer (106) being electrically insulating, the insulation layer of the rim 

 (106) and the insulation layer (106) is configured to overlap upon the rim (122) is fixating the light guide panel (120) to the frame (100).
